name: MISRA C++: Enforcement Plan Defined
description: Each guideline analysed has a defined enforcement means in the Guidelines Enforcement Plan.
rationale: MISRA Compliance:2020: the GEP records, for every guideline, the analysis tool(s), manual review, or other means used to enforce it.

examples.fails: the required compliance artifact/step is absent

source: MISRA Compliance:2020 — Achieving compliance with MISRA Coding Guidelines, applied to MISRA C++:2023. https://misra.org.uk/
